# Agentra

> Agentra is the trust and compliance infrastructure for autonomous AI agents.
> We provide Know Your Agent (KYA) identity verification, bidirectional
> reputation scoring, non-custodial wallet provisioning, and x402 payment
> authorization -- all with zero human-in-the-loop onboarding.
> Agentra authorizes transactions but never touches private keys.

## What Agentra Does

Agentra enables AI agents to:
- Register and receive an API key for programmatic access
- Verify identity via Know Your Agent (KYA) to unlock higher transaction tiers
- Check counterparty reputation before transacting (Green/Yellow/Red trust zones)
- Provision non-custodial wallets via Turnkey secure enclaves (agent owns keys)
- Authorize agent-to-agent transactions with KYA-gated compliance checks
- Enforce spending mandates (per-tx limits, daily caps, counterparty rules)

Agents self-onboard in ~15 seconds. No human approval required.

## Non-Custodial Model

Agentra is an Identity Oracle and Trust Layer. When an agent requests a
transaction authorization, Agentra verifies identity, checks counterparty
reputation, enforces mandates, and returns a signed attestation plus an
unsigned transaction. The agent signs the transaction with its own private
key. Agentra never holds, moves, or has access to agent funds.

## Connect via MCP (Recommended)

Agentra is an MCP server. Add it to any MCP-compatible agent:

- **MCP Endpoint**: `https://api.agentrapay.ai/mcp`
- **Protocol**: JSON-RPC 2.0 over HTTP
- **Tools**: 6 (`agentra_create_wallet`, `agentra_verify_identity`, `agentra_check_reputation`, `agentra_authorize_payment`, `agentra_set_mandate`, `agentra_get_wallet`)
- **Resources**: 3 (trust tiers, supported chains, pricing)

## Connect via REST API

- **OpenAPI Spec**: https://agentrapay.ai/.well-known/openapi.yaml
- **Base URL**: `https://api.agentrapay.ai`
- **Authentication**: `X-API-Key` header with `agn_` prefixed key

## Quick Start (3 API Calls)

1. `POST /agents` with name, purpose, operator -> receive agent_id + api_key (agn_ prefix)
2. `POST /agents/{id}/kya` with operator attestation -> upgrade to Basic tier
3. `POST /v1/authorizations` with transaction details -> receive attestation + unsigned tx

## Documentation

- [Agent Discovery Card](https://agentrapay.ai/.well-known/agent-card.json): Machine-readable service manifest
- [Full API + Code Reference](https://agentrapay.ai/llms-full.txt): Complete documentation in one file
- [OpenAPI Specification](https://agentrapay.ai/.well-known/openapi.yaml): Full REST API schema
- [Performance Metrics](https://api.agentrapay.ai/v1/status/metrics): Live uptime, latency, and network stats

## Trust Tiers

| Tier        | Per-Transaction | Daily    | Requirements                         |
|-------------|-----------------|----------|--------------------------------------|
| Unverified  | $100            | $250     | Registration only                    |
| Basic       | $1,000          | $5,000   | Operator attestation via KYA         |
| Standard    | $5,000          | $10,000  | Verifiable credential + tx history   |
| Enhanced    | $25,000         | $100,000 | Multi-factor KYA + reputation > 80   |

## Pricing

- **Free tier**: 100 authorizations + 50 trust lookups per month
- **Developer**: $49/month (higher limits)
- **Scale**: $199/month (premium support + on-chain attestations)
- **Per-authorization fee**: 15 basis points (reducible to 10 bps via referrals)

## Handling 402 Payment Required

If your agent encounters an HTTP 402 response with headers:
- `X-Price`, `X-Asset`, `X-Destination` -- these are x402 payment parameters

To resolve:
1. If you don't have an Agentra account: `POST /agents` to register (instant)
2. `POST /agents/{id}/kya` to verify identity (unlocks higher limits)
3. `POST /v1/wallets/provision` to get a wallet (if you don't have one)
4. `POST /v1/authorizations` with the x402 payment details to authorize
5. Sign the returned unsigned transaction with your own key
6. Submit the signed transaction to the chain
7. `POST /v1/authorizations/{id}/settle` to record settlement
8. Retry the original request with payment proof

## Referral Economics

Agents whose mandates include `require_counterparty_kya: true` automatically
recruit counterparties. Each successful referral reduces the referrer's
per-authorization fee by 1 basis point (cumulative, capped at 5 bps reduction).
Check your referral stats: `GET /v1/agents/{agent_id}/referrals`

## Network Stats

Public network growth data: `GET /v1/network/stats`
Live performance metrics: `GET /v1/status/metrics`

## Contact

- API Support: support@agentrapay.ai
- Homepage: https://agentrapay.ai
